title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tech Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Tech Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
Tech Mahindra has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tech Mahindra:
Tech Mahindra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tech Mahindra!
jsonLd.skills: Docker, Node.js, JavaScript, Java, Machine Learning, React, Microservices, AWS
